sentences.target: Ton chien est de race labrador.

translations.fr: Ton chien est de race labrador.
translations.en: Your dog is a Labrador breed.
translations.it: Il tuo cane è un labrador.
translations.vi: Con chó của bạn là giống Labrador.
translations.ja: あなたの犬はラブラドールです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'chien' as the possessor.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary in present (3rd person singular) linking the subject to the predicate.
Preposition introducing the PP 'de race labrador' indicating classification.
Common noun functioning as the complement of 'de'.
Common noun naming the specific breed; noun complement specifying the type of 'race'.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons une race calme pour les enfants.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ yn ʁas kalm puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons une race calme pour les enfants.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ yn ʁas kalm puʁ lez ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: We’re looking for a calm breed for the kids.
translations.es: Buscamos una raza tranquila para los niños.
translations.de: Wir suchen eine ruhige Rasse für die Kinder.
translations.it: Cerchiamo una razza tranquilla per i bambini.
translations.ko: 아이들을 위해 차분한 견종을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为孩子寻找一种安静的犬种。
translations.yue: 我哋想搵一種靜啲嘅犬種畀小朋友。
translations.ru: Мы ищем спокойную породу для детей.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma raça calma para as crianças.
translations.tr: Çocuklar için sakin bir cins arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một giống chó hiền cho trẻ em.
translations.nl: We zoeken een rustig hondenras voor de kinderen.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо спокійну породу для дітей.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के लिए शांत स्वभाव वाली नस्ल ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε μια ήρεμη ράτσα για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi ser etter en rolig rase for barna.
translations.id: Kami mencari ras yang tenang untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en lugn ras för barnen.
translations.ro: Căutăm o rasă calmă pentru copii.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en rolig race til børnene.
translations.ja: 子どもたちのために穏やかな犬種を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural) serving as the subject.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person plural); governs the direct object 'une race'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'race'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherchons'.
Adjective, feminine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'race'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/goal PP.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ce chat n'est pas de race.

translations.fr: Ce chat n'est pas de race.
translations.es: Este gato no es de raza.
translations.it: Questo gatto non è di razza.
translations.pt: Este gato não é de raça.
translations.vi: Con mèo này không phải mèo thuần chủng.
translations.ar: هذه القطة ليست من سلالة نقية.
translations.hi: यह बिल्ली शुद्ध नस्ल की नहीं है.
translations.el: Αυτή η γάτα δεν είναι καθαρόαιμη.
translations.sv: Den här katten är ikke renrasig.
translations.ro: Pisica aceasta nu este de rasă.
translations.ja: この猫は純血種ではありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'chat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject.
Copular auxiliary in present (3rd person singular) with attached negative clitic 'n'' (from 'ne'); part of the 'ne … pas' negation.
Negation adverb completing 'ne … pas' to mark sentential negation.
Preposition; in 'pas de N' expresses absence ('no N').
Common noun; complement of 'de' in the negative construction 'pas de race' (no pedigree).

sentences.target: On privilégie une race adaptée aux enfants.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁivileʒi yn ʁas adɐpte oz ɑ̃fɑ̃/

translations.fr: On privilégie une race adaptée aux enfants.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁivileʒi yn ʁas adɐpte oz ɑ̃fɑ̃/
translations.en: We favor a breed suited to children.
translations.es: Priorizamos una raza adecuada para los niños.
translations.it: Privilegiamo una razza adatta ai bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们更倾向于选择适合孩子的犬种。
translations.yue: 我哋會優先揀適合小朋友嘅犬種。
translations.ru: Мы отдаём предпочтение породе, подходящей детям.
translations.pt: Priorizamos uma raça adequada para crianças.
translations.he: אנחנו נותנים עדיפות לגזע שמתאים לילדים.
translations.tr: Çocuklara uygun bir cinsi tercih ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ưu tiên giống chó phù hợp với trẻ em.
translations.nl: We geven de voorkeur aan een ras dat geschikt is voor kinderen.
translations.uk: Ми надаємо перевагу породі, що підходить дітям.
translations.hi: हम बच्चों के लिए उपयुक्त नस्ल को प्राथमिकता देते हैं.
translations.el: Δίνουμε προτεραιότητα σε ράτσα που ταιριάζει στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi prioriterer en rase som passer for barn.
translations.id: Kami memprioritaskan ras yang cocok untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi prioriterar en ras som passar för barn.
translations.ro: Preferăm o rasă potrivită pentru copii.
translations.da: Vi prioriterer en race, der passer til børn.
translations.ja: 子どもに合う犬種を優先します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun used colloquially as 'we'; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present (3rd person singular); predicate meaning 'to favor/privilege'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'race'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'privilégie'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular agreeing with 'race'; post-nominal modifier meaning 'suited/appropriate'.
Preposition as a contraction of 'à' + 'les'; introduces the PP 'aux enfants'.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition 'à' (beneficiary).
